## Summary

Short description of the change and the problem it solves.

Closes: #<issue-number>

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Chore / Maintenance

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated
- [ ] `npm run pr:check` passes locally
- [ ] Migration notes included (if applicable)
- [ ] Docs updated (if applicable)

## How to test

Steps or commands a reviewer can use to verify the change.
